sub_pixel_system.notes: Doom engine based; sub-pixel precision not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: character_class_differences
special_mechanics.description: Three playable character classes with distinct physical characteristics. Fighter: tougher and faster. Mage: most fragile and slowest moving. Cleric: middle ground between fighter and mage.

special_mechanics.name: jumping
special_mechanics.description: Jumping capability introduced as modification to Doom engine

special_mechanics.name: vertical_looking
special_mechanics.description: Looking up and down capability added to Doom engine

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Wikipedia confirms Doom engine modifications including jumping and looking up/down, but specific movement parameters (speeds, acceleration, gravity values) are not documented in available sources. Character class balance differences are described qualitatively but not quantified.
sources_used: wikipedia - Hexen: Beyond Heretic (gameplay and development sections)
